---
title: /continue
summary: Continue work based on the current agent orchestration plan or implementation instructions.
---

# /continue

Use this command to:
- Resume or advance the current implementation plan
- Take the next logical step in an agent's orchestration
- Pick up from the last actionable instruction or checkpoint

## Usage
/continue

## Example
/continue

---
This prompt is used by Copilot CLI/chat and MinionLoom agents to continue work according to the current plan or instructions.
